pipelineDeals.name: Five Below
pipelineDeals.status: Five Below accepted the general facade intent but asked whether the proposed 22-foot elevation can go higher so Five Below is not dwarfed by other retailers. Shaun/C2 answered that the existing gable point is 23 feet 4 inches and the lower Big Lots parapet is 26 feet 7 inches, warning that increasing the parapet may stop blending aesthetically with the plaza and deferring final direction to Five Below/Clay.
pipelineDeals.nextStep: Clay/Jacob need to choose a facade-height posture for Five Below, either hold 22 feet or explore a higher parapet, and keep cost/constructability aligned with ownership.

Fable PRs 1-4 pulled/deployed through commit `97c3459`: daily-first brand, free World Cup Stadiums/Countries event engine, riddle/fact/speed scoring, persistent progress/completion share, clickable Stadiums/Nations progress bars in the featured dashboard, mode score chips, countdown, Plausible hook, and updated product/docs thesis. Mobile declutter commit `93255d8` and runtime fix commit `d840e1b` are live/verified with globe-first mobile layout, runtime mobile chrome handling, and local QA artifacts. Mobile cleanup/tap-hint batch was current through `cfca5a9`; homepage launcher batch is live through `f7c09b6` with Daily / Host Stadiums / 32 Nations launcher cards and deep links skipping the launcher; Fable scoring/footer batch `f855dd7` is now live with Host Stadiums scoring each pin out of 1,000 by distance, the clutter paragraph removed, and SHIPPED comment posted after live checks; earlier Fable deploy queue issue #1 for hash `1960ed4` was processed, production deployed, and SHIPPED comment posted after live checks. `.github/FABLE_JARVIS_HANDOFF.md` documents the Fable/Jarvis handoff protocol. Jacob then asked Jarvis to take code/deploy ownership back from Fable for now; Jarvis reproduced and fixed the mobile Host Stadiums result-sheet lock bug in commit `1eae38d`, then finished the live mobile bugfix chain through `135c7db` (`cbf8cbc` missing `isMobileLayout` freeze fix, `fcbd4ff` result-sheet contrast fix, `135c7db` Next-question stale-sheet reset); live app.js markers verified. Mobile QA/polish chain is live through `a2b1d8b`: result scoring sheet polish, mobile spacing, hidden coordinates, separated fact/Next button spacing, exact-pin-only 1,000-point Host Stadiums scoring with distance-based ratings, and live verification of scoring markers. Full Host Stadiums playthrough polish is live through `3f5fde0`: `a00a4d3` tightened scoring, `d3c8641` added a 200-point floor using `Math.max(200, Math.round(1000 / (1 + mi / 54)))`, and mobile+desktop 16-round QA completed with final-results polish. Public launcher/final Host Stadiums launch polish is live through `ad80ad2`: `1a22d1e` hid 32 Nations from launcher/nav while preserving direct `/countries`, `343596f` removed Daily from initial launcher so root promotes Host Stadiums only, `3d1844d` fixed the Host Stadiums launcher click after hiding Daily, and `ad80ad2` makes displayed 0-mile pins score perfect 1,000. Scoring rebalance commit `b1da13b` is also live, removing visible Floor labels and tapering huge misses into a varied ~200-point band while keeping 5mi≈915 and 241mi≈612. Progress tick color commit `a880140` is live, coloring progress dots by score quality/hit-miss with live root/stadiums/countries CSS and app.js markers verified. Visual design polish commit `6ad6477` is also live, tightening the dark premium art direction with layered glow/grid background, glassy panels, stronger gold CTA/buttons, revised launcher card typography/layout, and higher-contrast UI states; live `/stadiums` CSS and `app.js` scoring/mobile markers verified. Late-night guidance/logo/share polish is live through `349a27d`: `934860d` clarified zoom guidance and current-run progress state, `b758d4d` changed the main logo to the stadium icon, and `349a27d` makes share text/native share URLs point to root `https://stadiumgeo.com`; live root/stadiums HTML and app.js share/scoring/mobile markers verified. Late-night launch polish/hotfix is also live: stale gameplay CTAs were cleaned up, a dedicated 5-question Daily pool was added, share URL text was moved forward, OG cards were refreshed with the stadium logo, root Daily + Host Stadiums routes passed live QA, and a root Daily “Loading” regression from mismatched Daily data boot wiring was patched/deployed with live mobile assertion passing. Morning mobile UX polish is live through `7de3c0d`: `2d81cfb` shows zoom onboarding only on question 1 with cleaner tap/drop-pin copy after that, and `7de3c0d` delays the mobile result card about 1.25s so the map line/answer reveal is visible before the sheet slides in. Mobile light-theme contrast hotfix commit `b08ddad` is also live/verified: mobile clue/question text now uses dark/muted colors instead of white-on-light, with repo clean and live root/app HTTP 200 plus app scoring/mobile markers verified. Mobile answer-sheet controls are live through `017a0da`: `6c6eb6e` made the mobile answer sheet collapsible after reveal, `07265b3` replaced the drag bar with a caret toggle separated from Next, and `017a0da` made the caret click-only so repeated caret taps do not advance questions; repo clean/live root+app HTTP 200 and app sheet/scoring markers verified. Clue/hint/results polish is live through `d39daf8`: `1441b30` hides the bottom floating mobile tap/zoom hint after question 1, `50b2e3f` restores clue-card blurbs/flags for every question, and `d39daf8` adds a full Host Stadiums completion modal with all 16 stadium rows, 1,000-point score bars, close control, and share/CTA actions; repo clean/live root+app HTTP 200 and app clue/hint/results/scoring/mobile markers verified. Share/OG preview hotfixes are live through `52abe6a`: `3a53a0e` avoids duplicate URLs in native iPhone share, and `52abe6a` regenerates social preview cards with full STADIUM GEO wordmark and “Daily sports geography.” copy; repo clean/live root+app HTTP 200 plus app share/scoring/mobile markers verified. Event-results-to-Daily hotfix `6210b02` is also live/verified: closing completed Host Stadiums results now loads a real Daily state instead of stale mobile “Loading…” prompt, with completed Daily state mobile prompt text updated; repo clean/live root+app HTTP 200 plus Daily/results/share/scoring/mobile markers verified. Mobile header polish `1f2aa20` is live/verified with a slimmer transparent top control row, smaller logo/title/Modes pill, and adjusted prompt/map offsets. Daily scoring/results `094523f` is live/verified: Daily keeps accuracy points intact, adds speed bonus up to +100, caps each question at 1,100, and shows a 5-row Daily results modal with speed bonus, Share, and Play Host Stadiums actions; forced-complete live assertion passed. Friend-ready Daily/onboarding pass `ab5c272` is also live/verified: expanded Daily to 31 venues with easy/medium/hard mix, restored Daily as the primary launcher option alongside Host Stadiums, bumped DATA_VERSION for cache busting, and added `question_loaded`/`pin_placed`/`final_modal_closed` analytics. Live verification passed for launcher/root, `/stadiums`, and app.js markers. Mobile safe-area/friend-share polish is live through `356fdf2`: `c9dfa58` hardened iOS clue-card safe top and switched Daily labels to calendar dates, `79a9e55` lowered the mobile header below the safe area, `a7e50dc` fixed mobile Daily Lock In/speed-bonus submission and lifted the dock above iOS browser chrome with a touchend handler, `1c27a3a` raised the mobile question card, `7c4e658` normalized visible wordmark to all-caps STADIUM GEO, and `356fdf2` applies the zoomed-out pin nudge to Daily as well as Host Stadiums. Verified repo clean at `356fdf2`, live root/app HTTP 200, root STADIUM GEO/Daily/Host/OG markers, and app safe-area/Daily/zoom/scoring/mobile markers. Daily riddle/lock-in polish is live through `40e8b8e`: `201386b` lowered the pin-placed Lock In dock back to the shared 72px gameplay position after the JS submit bug was fixed, `d2928b2` removed generic Daily riddle subtitles and hides empty hint lines, and `40e8b8e` replaces those subtitles with compact context tags like “Soccer · Spain · Medium.” Verified repo clean at `40e8b8e`, live root/app HTTP 200, root STADIUM GEO/Daily/Host/OG markers, and app Daily/lock-in/scoring/mobile markers. Daily scoring/icon polish is live through `94b3b3d`: `d780a75` retuned Daily to exact-venue scoring with perfect-only speed reward, `1ee3b1b` hid the disclaimer/footer in Daily mode, `f82c85b` restored the 5,500 max with perfect-only speed points, `076c3d5` softened the distance curve, `5c208ef` keeps per-question accuracy as base score out of 1,000 while displaying speed bonus separately, `0269eed` improved regional-knowledge credit, `1e597b2` replaced the favicon/apple-touch icons with the gold stadium mark, and `94b3b3d` uses the generous Host Stadiums-style event curve for Daily accuracy. Verified repo clean at `94b3b3d`, live root/app HTTP 200, root STADIUM GEO/Daily/Host/OG/favicon markers, and app Daily/score/speed/scoring/mobile markers. Launcher/share-card polish is live through `a8b844c`: `637a0d3` added local reset links, `7a037eb`/`93c35b3` refined launcher tagline copy, and `a8b844c` refreshed the social share card.
